description.value: **`<lr-activity-feed>`** (default: `16rem`) — Cap on how tall the expanded body grows before it scrolls internally (non-virtualized mode); also sizes the internal virtual-list.
**`<lr-agent-run>`** (default: `1s linear`) — Current-step icon spin animation duration and timing.
**`<lr-animated-image>`** — The size of `control-box`. Defaults to `var(--lr-icon-button-size)`.
**`<lr-animated-image>`** — The size of the play/pause icons. Defaults to `calc(var(--lr-icon-button-size) * 0.35)`.
**`<lr-animated-image>`** — Caps the rendered media's block-size. Defaults to `var(--lr-size-20rem)`.
**`<lr-animation>`** (default: `25%`) — Peak lift height of the bounce preset.
**`<lr-animation>`** (default: `4%`) — Horizontal travel of the shake preset.
**`<lr-animation>`** (default: `100%`) — Travel distance for the slide-in/slide-out/slide-in-up/slide-in-down presets.
**`<lr-animation>`** (default: `0.5`) — Starting/ending scale factor for the zoom-in/zoom-out presets.
**`<lr-app-rail>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-4rem)`) — The inline rail's width in `'icon-only'` mode, and the maximum width of each slotted `<lr-app-rail-item>` in that mode.
**`<lr-app-rail>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-18rem)`) — The mobile overlay panel's width, capped at `85vw`.
**`<lr-app-rail>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-overlay)`) — The mobile overlay scrim's background.
**`<lr-app-rail>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-15rem)`) — The inline rail's width in `'full'` mode. Overridden by an inline width while a `resizable` rail has an explicit `railWidthPx`.

**`<lr-attachment-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text-quiet)`) — Accent color used for the status text, spinner, and progress fill. Auto-swapped per `status` (`uploading`/`error`/`done`); the default is the neutral `pending` tone.
**`<lr-attachment-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) — Chip background, auto-swapped per `status` to that status's `-quiet` tint.
**`<lr-attachment-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) — Chip border color. Every non-`pending` `status` sets it to `transparent`.
**`<lr-attachment-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-size-xs)`) — Font size of `[part="base"]` while `compact`.
**`<lr-attachment-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-0-25rem)`) — Gap between the chip's parts while `compact`.
**`<lr-attachment-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1-75rem)`) — Thumbnail size while `compact`, rethemeable independently of `--lr-icon-button-size`.
**`<lr-attachment-chip>`** (default: `0.8s`) — Duration of one indeterminate upload-spinner rotation. The ambient loop stops under reduced motion.
**`<lr-audio-visualizer>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) — Active bar/waveform color.
**`<lr-audio-visualizer>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-3rem)`) — The host's block size, which the canvas fills at 100%.
**`<lr-audio-visualizer>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) — Inactive/idle color.
**`<lr-av-player>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-16rem)`) — Block size of the virtualized transcript list.
**`<lr-avatar>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) — Container background. Each non-neutral `tone` sets it to that tone's `-quiet` tint.
**`<lr-avatar>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) — Initials/glyph color. Each non-neutral `tone` sets it to that tone's loud color.

**`<lr-avatar-group>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-2rem)`) — Sizes the overflow badge to match the slotted avatars. Does not resize the avatars themselves (see class doc) — set a matching `size` on each `<lr-avatar>` child directly for that.
**`<lr-avatar-group>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) — Overflow badge background. Tone-driven; see `tone`.
**`<lr-avatar-group>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) — Overflow badge text color. Tone-driven; see `tone`.

**`<lr-avatar-group>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-neg-6px)`) — Horizontal overlap between consecutive avatars (a logical `margin-inline-start`, so it auto-mirrors under `dir="rtl"`). Setting this to `0` or a positive length is a supported escape hatch that turns the stack into normal, non-overlapping spacing.
**`<lr-avatar-group>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) — The cutout-style ring drawn around every avatar and the overflow badge.
**`<lr-avatar-group>`** (default: `var(--lr-border-width-medium)`) — Ring thickness.
**`<lr-avatar>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-2rem)`) — Inline and block size of the container. `size` swaps it to `var(--lr-size-1-5rem)` (`sm`) or `var(--lr-size-2-5rem)` (`lg`).
**`<lr-badge>`, `<lr-tag>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) — The badge's background. Each non-neutral `variant` sets it to that variant's `-quiet` tint.
**`<lr-badge>`, `<lr-tag>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) — The badge's border color. Each non-neutral `variant` sets it to that variant's loud color.
**`<lr-badge>`, `<lr-tag>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) — The badge's text color. Each non-neutral `variant` sets it to that variant's loud color.
**`<lr-browser-frame>`** (default: `16 / 9`) — The viewport's aspect ratio.
**`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) — Text/glyph color for the chrome-less appearances (`outlined`, `plain`, `link`). Swapped per `variant` to that variant's semantic color.
**`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-neutral)`) — Background of `appearance="accent"` (and its border color). Swapped per `variant` to that variant's semantic color.
**`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-on-neutral)`) — Text color on top of `--lr-button-accent-fill`. Swapped per `variant` to that variant's `on-*` color.
**`<lr-button>`** (default: `0.9875`) — `transform: scale()` factor applied while a non-disabled button is pressed.
**`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) — Border color of the internal button. Swapped per `variant` to that variant's semantic color.
**`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) — Background of `appearance="filled"`. Swapped per `variant` to that variant's semantic color.
**`<lr-button-group>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-2xs)`) — Gap between grouped controls.
**`<lr-button>`** (default: `1.08`) — `filter: brightness()` multiplier applied while hovering a non-disabled button.
**`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) — Text color on top of `--lr-button-fill`. Swapped per `variant` to that variant's `on-*` color.
**`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border-strong)`) — Border color of `appearance="outlined"`, which overrides `--lr-button-border`.
**`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) — Border color of `appearance="quiet"`.
**`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text-quiet)`) — Text color of `appearance="quiet"`.
**`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1-25rem)`) — `min-block-size` at `size="2xs"`.
**`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-2-5rem)`) — `min-block-size` at `size="l"`.
**`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-2rem)`) — `min-block-size` at `size="m"`.
**`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1-75rem)`) — `min-block-size` at `size="s"`.
**`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-3rem)`) — `min-block-size` at `size="xl"`.
**`<lr-button>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1-5rem)`) — `min-block-size` at `size="xs"`.
**`<lr-button>`** (default: `1s`) — Rotation period of the `loading` spinner.

**`<lr-button>`** (default: `100%`) — Inline size of the internal button. The host defaults it to `100%` so the native button follows the host's own width; override to `auto` (or any other value) for a compact inline composition.
**`<lr-calendar>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-6rem)`) — Minimum block size of a day cell.
**`<lr-calendar>`** (default: `4rem`) — Minimum block size of a day cell once the host is narrower than 28rem.
**`<lr-calendar-viewer>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum block size of `[part="body"]` before it scrolls internally. The `maxHeight` property sets this token inline on `[part="base"]`.
**`<lr-callout>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) — The callout surface's background. Each non-neutral `variant` sets it to that variant's `-quiet` tint.
**`<lr-callout>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) — The callout surface's border color. Each non-neutral `variant` sets it to that variant's loud color.
**`<lr-callout>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) — The callout's text color. Each non-neutral `variant` sets it to that variant's loud color.

**`<lr-bar-chart>`, `<lr-bubble-chart>`, `<lr-chart>`, `<lr-doughnut-chart>`, `<lr-histogram>`, `<lr-line-chart>`, `<lr-pie-chart>`, `<lr-polar-area-chart>`, `<lr-radar-chart>`, `<lr-scatter-chart>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) — Grid-line color. Resolved via `getComputedStyle` on every draw (Chart.js paints to canvas and cannot consume `var()`).

**`<lr-bar-chart>`, `<lr-bubble-chart>`, `<lr-chart>`, `<lr-doughnut-chart>`, `<lr-histogram>`, `<lr-line-chart>`, `<lr-pie-chart>`, `<lr-polar-area-chart>`, `<lr-radar-chart>`, `<lr-scatter-chart>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-280px)`) — The host's `block-size`. Set on the host element from the `height` property on every change (custom properties only cascade downward, so it cannot be set from inside the shadow root); a host-level override is overwritten the next time `height` changes.

**`<lr-bar-chart>`, `<lr-bubble-chart>`, `<lr-chart>`, `<lr-doughnut-chart>`, `<lr-histogram>`, `<lr-line-chart>`, `<lr-pie-chart>`, `<lr-polar-area-chart>`, `<lr-radar-chart>`, `<lr-scatter-chart>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) — Legend label color. Resolved via `getComputedStyle` on every draw.

**`<lr-bar-chart>`, `<lr-bubble-chart>`, `<lr-chart>`, `<lr-doughnut-chart>`, `<lr-histogram>`, `<lr-line-chart>`, `<lr-pie-chart>`, `<lr-polar-area-chart>`, `<lr-radar-chart>`, `<lr-scatter-chart>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text-quiet)`) — Axis tick-label color; also used for the `xLabel`/`yLabel`/`y2Label` axis-title text (there is no separate title-color token). Resolved via `getComputedStyle` on every draw.

**`<lr-bar-chart>`, `<lr-bubble-chart>`, `<lr-chart>`, `<lr-doughnut-chart>`, `<lr-histogram>`, `<lr-line-chart>`, `<lr-pie-chart>`, `<lr-polar-area-chart>`, `<lr-radar-chart>`, `<lr-scatter-chart>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) — Tooltip background color. Resolved via `getComputedStyle` on every draw.

**`<lr-bar-chart>`, `<lr-bubble-chart>`, `<lr-chart>`, `<lr-doughnut-chart>`, `<lr-histogram>`, `<lr-line-chart>`, `<lr-pie-chart>`, `<lr-polar-area-chart>`, `<lr-radar-chart>`, `<lr-scatter-chart>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) — Tooltip text color. Resolved via `getComputedStyle` on every draw.
**`<lr-chat-message>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) — Bubble fill for every role except `user`.
**`<lr-chat-message>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) — Bubble text color for every role except `user`.
**`<lr-chat-message>`** (default: `80%`) — Maximum inline size of the message bubble.
**`<lr-chat-message>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) — Bubble fill for `data-role="user"`.
**`<lr-chat-message>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) — Bubble text color for `data-role="user"`.
**`<lr-checkpoint>`** (default: `1s`) — Duration of one restoring-spinner rotation (stopped under reduced motion).
**`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) — Text/icon color of the pill. Each `tone` sets it to that tone's loud color.
**`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) — Background of the pill. Each `tone` sets it to that tone's `-quiet` tint.
**`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) — Border color of the pill. Every non-neutral `tone` sets it to `transparent`.
**`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-size-sm)`) — Label font size. Each `size` sets it to that step's font size.
**`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-xs)`) — Gap between the icon, label, and remove button. Each `size` sets it to that step's gap.
**`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-size-sm)`) — Font size of the `icon` slot wrapper. Each `size` sets it to that step's icon size.
**`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-0-25rem)`) — Block padding of the pill. Each `size` sets it to that step's block padding.
**`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-s)`) — Inline padding of the pill. Each `size` sets it to that step's inline padding.
**`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-chip-bg)`) — Background while a toggleable chip is selected, independently themeable from its resting background.
**`<lr-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-chip-accent)`) — Border color while a toggleable chip is selected, independently themeable from the label/icon color.

**`<lr-citation-badge>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text-quiet)`) — Text color of `base`, and its hover border color. Swapped by the reflected `status`: `var(--lr-color-success)` for `high`/`verified`, `var(--lr-color-warning)` for `medium`/`low`, `var(--lr-color-danger)` for `unverified`.
**`<lr-citation-badge>`** (default: `transparent`) — Background of `base`. Swapped by the reflected `status` to the matching `-quiet` tone (`success`/`warning`/`danger`).
**`<lr-citation-badge>`** (default: `transparent`) — Resting border color of `base`; no `status` changes it, so it stays transparent unless a host overrides it.
**`<lr-code-block>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-mono)`) — Monospace family for the rendered `pre` and `code`.
**`<lr-code-block>`** (default: `none`) — Scroll cap applied to `body`. The `max-height` attribute, when set, writes this same property inline on `body` and therefore wins.
**`<lr-code-editor>`** (default: `1.5`) — Line height shared by the gutter and the textarea, so line numbers stay aligned with their lines.
**`<lr-code-editor>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-8rem)`) — Minimum block size of the editor frame and its textarea.
**`<lr-code-editor>`** (default: `2`) — The textarea's `tab-size`. The single channel for tab width — the class writes this token rather than setting `tab-size` directly.
**`<lr-combobox>`** — Decorative expand-icon box size, scaled by `size`.
**`<lr-combobox>`** — Input text size.
**`<lr-combobox>`** — Selected-tag text size.
**`<lr-combobox>`** — Selected-tag padding.
**`<lr-combobox>`** — Minimum input-container block size.
**`<lr-combobox>`** — Padding inside the input container.
**`<lr-command-palette>`** (default: `50vh`) — Maximum height of the scrolling command list.
**`<lr-command-palette>`** (default: `70vh`) — Maximum dialog height.
**`<lr-command-palette>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-48rem)`) — Maximum dialog width.
**`<lr-command-palette>`** (default: `12vh`) — Gap between the viewport top and the dialog.
**`<lr-command-palette>`** (default: `var(--lr-overlay-stack-index, var(--lr-layer-modal))`) — Stacking index of the backdrop.
**`<lr-compare-panel>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-24rem)`) — Cap on how tall each pane's scroll region grows before it scrolls internally.
**`<lr-contact-viewer>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum block size of the scrollable body before it scrolls internally. Also settable via the `max-height` property.

**`<lr-context-meter>`** — Per-segment color. Set inline on `[part="segment"]` by the component itself whenever that segment supplies a `color`; unset (and the token unread) otherwise, leaving the `data-tone` palette in charge.
**`<lr-control-group>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-xs)`) — Gap between grouped controls.

**`<lr-dashboard-grid>`** (default: `12`) — Column count of the underlying CSS Grid. Written inline on `[part="base"]` from the `columns` property on every render, so the fallback only applies to a `[part="base"]` this component has not rendered yet.
**`<lr-dashboard-grid>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-m)`) — Gap between cells on both axes. Written inline on `[part="base"]` from the `gap` property (in px) on every render.
**`<lr-dashboard-grid>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-5rem)`) — Row track height. Written inline on `[part="base"]` from the `rowHeight` property (in px) on every render.
**`<lr-dataset-viewer>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) — Outline color of a highlighted cell. The active highlight sets it inline to `var(--lr-color-warning, var(--lr-color-brand))`.
**`<lr-dataset-viewer>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum block size of `[part="body"]` before it scrolls internally. The `maxHeight` property sets this token inline on `[part="base"]`.
**`<lr-date-input>`** (default: `inherit`) — Font size of the text input, scaled by `size`.
**`<lr-date-input>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-xs)`) — Block padding of the input row, scaled by `size`.
**`<lr-date-input>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-s)`) — Inline padding of the input row, scaled by `size`.

**`<lr-dialog>`, `<lr-drawer>`** (default: `var(--lr-dialog-width, var(--lr-size-32rem))`) — Cap on the panel's inline size. Falls back to `--lr-dialog-width` when that is set, so an assertive width is not clipped by the 32rem default; the viewport (`100%`) is always a hard limit on top.
**`<lr-dialog>`, `<lr-drawer>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-overlay)`) — Backdrop scrim color.
**`<lr-dialog>`, `<lr-drawer>`** (default: `auto`) — Assertive inline size for the panel. Left at `auto` the panel shrink-wraps to its content.
**`<lr-diff-view>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-mono)`) — Font family used for the diff lines.
**`<lr-dock-panel>`** (default: `var(--lr-icon-button-size)`) — The extent the panel keeps along its resize axis while `collapsed` -- enough to still host the toggle button that re-expands it.
**`<lr-document-compare>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-24rem)`) — Maximum block size of a side-by-side pane before it scrolls internally.
**`<lr-document-preview>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-mono)`) — Font used for plain-text previews.
**`<lr-document-preview>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum body block size before the preview scrolls internally.

**`<lr-document-preview>`** (default: `0`) — Unitless 0-100 completion of the determinate loading ring (multiplied by `1%` in its conic gradient). Written inline by the component from the clamped `progress` value, so it is a read-out rather than a consumer knob.
**`<lr-document-preview>`** (default: `0.8s`) — Duration of one indeterminate loading-indicator rotation.
**`<lr-document-viewer>`** (default: `70vh`) — Maximum block size of the dialog body before it scrolls internally.
**`<lr-docx-viewer>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum block size of the scrollable document body before it scrolls internally. Also settable via the `max-height` property.

**`<lr-drawer>`** (default: `calc(-1 * var(--lr-size-1rem))`) — Horizontal offset the panel animates in from for start/end drawers. Set per placement (and flipped under RTL) by the stylesheet; only read when `prefers-reduced-motion` is `no-preference`.

**`<lr-drawer>`** (default: `calc(-1 * var(--lr-size-1rem))`) — Vertical offset the panel animates in from for top/bottom drawers. Set to `var(--lr-size-1rem)` for `bottom`; only read when `prefers-reduced-motion` is `no-preference`.
**`<lr-drawer>`** — Block size for top/bottom drawers.
**`<lr-drawer>`** — Inline size for start/end drawers.
**`<lr-email-viewer>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum block size of `[part="body"]` before it scrolls internally. The `maxHeight` property sets this token inline on `[part="base"]`.
**`<lr-emoji-picker>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-2xs)`) — Gap between emoji within a windowed row.
**`<lr-emoji-picker>`** (default: `var(--lr-icon-button-size)`) — Each emoji button's box. Clamped up to `--lr-icon-button-size`: a smaller value does not shrink the button.

**`<lr-emoji-picker>`** (default: `calc(var(--lr-emoji-picker-item-size) + var(--lr-space-l))`) — One windowed row's height. Must stay at or above the item size plus the group-label band, or consecutive absolutely-positioned rows overlap.
**`<lr-empty>`** — Cross-axis and text alignment used in compact mode; set to `center` for dense but centered empty states.
**`<lr-empty>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-xs)`) — Padding used in compact mode; accepts any padding shorthand (e.g. `8px 2px`).
**`<lr-entity-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) — Background color.
**`<lr-entity-chip>`** (default: `transparent`) — Border color of the chip.

**`<lr-entity-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) — Text/accent color. Reflected `type` lets a host theme per type from CSS, e.g. `lr-entity-chip[type='person'] { --lr-entity-chip-color: ... }`.
**`<lr-file-icon>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-2rem)`) — Inline/block size of the format badge.
**`<lr-flag>`** (default: `4 / 3`) — Rectangular flag aspect ratio.
**`<lr-flag>`** (default: `cover`) — How the image fits its flag frame.
**`<lr-flag>`** — Rectangular flag corner radius.

**`<lr-flow-canvas>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-0-5rem)`) — Dotted background spacing. The canvas also writes it inline as `${grid}px` from the `grid` property, which wins over the stylesheet fallback whenever a grid is in effect.
**`<lr-flow-canvas>`** (default: `var(--lr-transition-ambient)`) — Running-edge march animation duration.
**`<lr-flow-minimap>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-8rem)`) — Map block size.
**`<lr-flow-minimap>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-12rem)`) — Map inline size.
**`<lr-flow-node>`** (default: `calc(var(--lr-size-10rem) + var(--lr-size-1rem))`) — Minimum card inline size.
**`<lr-gauge>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) — Fill stroke for radial, ring, and linear gauges.

**`<lr-graph>`** — Ordered categorical fallback palette for a typed node with no `GraphNodeType.color`, assigned by the type's index in `nodeTypes` (wraps every 8 entries). Declared centrally in `tokens.styles.ts` so `<lr-graph>` and any future `<lr-graph-legend>`- style component resolve the identical default.

**`<lr-graph>`** (default: `0.35`) — Opacity applied to a node/link when `dimmedNodeIds`/`dimmedLinkIds` includes its id (both SVG and canvas renderers). Visible by default -- a consumer controlling `dimmedNodeIds`/`dimmedLinkIds` (e.g. `lr-knowledge-graph-explorer`) sees the dimming take effect with no extra host styling.
**`<lr-graph>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) — Legibility halo (`stroke`) behind a drawn edge label, painted under the fill via `paint-order: stroke`.
**`<lr-graph>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) — `focus-halo` stroke color.
**`<lr-graph>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) — Hull fill/stroke color.
**`<lr-graph>`** (default: `0.12`) — Hull element opacity (composites fill+stroke as one group, avoiding a double-opacity seam at the fill/stroke boundary).
**`<lr-graph>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-success)`) — Selected node/link stroke.
**`<lr-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-danger)`) — Border color for an annotated cell.

**`<lr-heatmap>`** (default: `linear-gradient(to right, var(--lr-heatmap-scale-lo), var(--lr-heatmap-scale-hi))`) — Gradient painted on the continuous legend bar. Set on the host by the component itself while `colorSteps` is supplied, and removed again when it is not; the fallback is the two-endpoint scale ramp.
**`<lr-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lr-focus-ring-color)`) — Focus ring around a focused cell.
**`<lr-heatmap>`** — Font for axis/legend labels drawn on the canvas.
**`<lr-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-no-data)`) — Fill for cells with no value.
**`<lr-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) — High endpoint of the sequential color ramp.
**`<lr-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) — Low endpoint of the sequential color ramp.
**`<lr-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-success)`) — Border color for the selected cell.
**`<lr-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) — Hover tooltip background.
**`<lr-heatmap>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) — Hover tooltip text color.
**`<lr-html-viewer>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum block size of `[part="body"]` before it scrolls internally. The `maxHeight` property sets this token inline on `[part="base"]`.

**`<lr-icon-button>`** (default: `2.5rem`) — Inline and block size of the native button. A library-wide token (declared on `:root` by `tokens.styles.ts`, and the shared minimum tappable size several other components size their icon controls against), so overriding it globally resizes all of them together.
**`<lr-icon>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1-25rem)`) — Inline and block size of the icon box.

**`<lr-ingestion-queue>`** (default: `none`) — Non-virtualized mode only: caps how tall the list grows before it scrolls internally. Has no effect once virtualized -- the internal `<lr-virtual-list>`'s own viewport keeps its independent, fixed default height (retheme it directly via `<lr-ingestion-queue>`'s own `lr-virtual-list { --lr-virtual-list-height: ... }` if needed).
**`<lr-input>`, `<lr-number-input>`, `<lr-time-input>`** — Outer control height floor, scaled by `size`.
**`<lr-input>`, `<lr-number-input>`, `<lr-time-input>`** — Font size of the native input, scaled by `size`.
**`<lr-input>`, `<lr-number-input>`, `<lr-time-input>`** — Block padding of the native input, scaled by `size`.
**`<lr-input>`, `<lr-number-input>`, `<lr-time-input>`** — Inline padding of the control row, scaled by `size`.
**`<lr-json-viewer>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-mono)`) — Font family used for the rendered tree.
**`<lr-json-viewer>`** (default: `none`) — Cap on `[part="base"]`'s block size, past which the viewer scrolls internally. The `maxHeight` property sets this token inline on `[part="base"]`.
**`<lr-known-date>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-3-5em)`) — Inline size of the day field.
**`<lr-known-date>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-size-md-sm)`) — Font size of each `field-input`, auto-swapped per `size`.
**`<lr-known-date>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-s)`) — Gap between the three field blocks.
**`<lr-known-date>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-s)`) — Block padding of each `field-input`, auto-swapped per `size`.
**`<lr-known-date>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-s)`) — Inline padding of each `field-input`, auto-swapped per `size`.
**`<lr-known-date>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-3-5em)`) — Inline size of the month field.
**`<lr-known-date>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-5em)`) — Inline size of the year field.
**`<lr-lightbox>`** — Background for every floating/toolbar icon button.
**`<lr-lightbox>`** — Icon/text color paired with `--lr-lightbox-control-bg`.
**`<lr-lightbox>`** — The backdrop scrim color.
**`<lr-graph>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) — Default link stroke, overridden per-link by a link's own `color`.
**`<lr-lite-chart>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) — Stroke for a bar/point whose category index is in `selectedIndex`.
**`<lr-markdown>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-mono)`) — Monospace family for rendered `<code>` inside `content`.
**``** (default: `var(--lr-size-20rem)`) — Cap on the block size of the ``/`
**`<lr-mind-map>`** (default: `6rem`) — Radius step per depth ring.
**`<lr-graph>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) — Default node fill, overridden per-node by `GraphNode.color`.
**`<lr-notebook-viewer>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum block size of the scrollable body before it scrolls internally. Also settable via the `max-height` property.
**`<lr-dropdown>`, `<lr-popover>`** — Maximum inline size of the popup (default `--lr-size-20rem`).
**`<lr-page-rail>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-24rem)`) — Block size of the virtualized rail.
**`<lr-pagination>`** — Control inline/block size; defaults from the `size` variant.
**`<lr-pagination>`** — Control font size; defaults from the `size` variant.
**`<lr-pdf-viewer>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-24rem)`) — Block size of the virtualized page list.
**`<lr-playback>`** (default: `calc(var(--lr-icon-button-size) * 0.35)`) — Font size of the play/pause glyph, derived from the shared icon-button hit-target size.
**`<lr-progress-ring>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-2-5rem)`) — Outer diameter of the ring.
**`<lr-push-to-talk>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-3rem)`) — Inline and block size of the circular `trigger` button.
**`<lr-qr-code>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) — Light/background module color, including the quiet zone.
**`<lr-qr-code>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) — Dark/foreground module color.
**`<lr-random-content>`** (default: `300ms`) — Duration of the entrance animation.
**`<lr-random-content>`** (default: `ease`) — Easing function for the entrance animation.
**`<lr-random-content>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-0-5em)`) — Translation distance for directional animations.
**`<lr-rating>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) — Unfilled-star color.
**`<lr-rating>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-warning)`) — Filled-star color.
**`<lr-rating>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-size-xl)`) — Star size.
**`<lr-responsive-panel>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-overlay)`) — The overlay presentation's scrim color, applied to `[part="backdrop"]`.
**`<lr-segmented>`, `<lr-tabs>`** (default: `2rem`) — Width of the static fade at each horizontal scroll edge.
**`<lr-scroller>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-2rem)`) — Control size.
**`<lr-scroller>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-10rem)`) — Minimum vertical scroller size.
**`<lr-segmented>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-size-sm)`) — Each segment's font size. Re-set per `size`; this default applies at the unset/`m` size.
**`<lr-segmented>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-0-125rem) var(--lr-space-s)`) — Each segment's padding. Re-set per `size`; this default applies at the unset/`m` size.
**`<lr-segmented>`** (default: `auto`) — Minimum height of the `base` track. Re-set per `size` (`2xs` through `xl`); the `auto` default applies at the unset/`m` size.
**`<lr-select>`** — Decorative expand-icon box size, scaled by `size`.
**`<lr-select>`** — Trigger font size, scaled by `size`.

**`<lr-select>`** (default: `auto`) — Exact trigger height. Left at `auto` the trigger is floored only; set it to a length to both floor and cap the trigger (e.g. to pixel-match a sibling field in the same row).
**`<lr-select>`** — Trigger block-size floor, scaled by `size`. Applied only for the `xs`/`s`/`l`/`xl` tiers — see the stylesheet note; the default tier stays floor-free.
**`<lr-select>`** — Trigger padding shorthand, scaled by `size`.
**`<lr-sequence-strip>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1-5rem)`) — Block size of the strip.
**`<lr-sequence-strip>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-0-625rem)`) — Inline and block size of a legend swatch.
**`<lr-sequence-strip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text)`) — Color of the bottom marker on a `marker: true` cell.
**`<lr-skeleton>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1em)`) — Block size of the placeholder.
**`<lr-skeleton>`** (default: `100%`) — Inline size of the placeholder.
**`<lr-span-waterfall>`** (default: `8rem`) — Width of the name gutter column.
**`<lr-span-waterfall>`** — Animation duration for a `running` span's striped bar; defaults to `--lr-transition-ambient`.
**`<lr-sparkline>`** (default: `0.15`) — Fill opacity of the area under the line (type="area").
**`<lr-sparkline>`** (default: `1.5`) — Stroke width of the line/area path.
**`<lr-spinner>`** (default: `800ms`) — Duration of one rotation. Not read under `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`, where the animation is disabled entirely.
**`<lr-spinner>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1-25rem)`) — Outer diameter of the indicator.
**`<lr-spinner>`** (default: `var(--lr-border-width-medium)`) — Thickness of the ring track.
**`<lr-split>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-overlay)`) — The `'floating'` drawer scrim's color, applied to `[part="backdrop"]`.
**`<lr-stack-trace>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-mono)`) — Font family for the parsed frames and the verbatim raw fallback.

**`<lr-stack-trace>`** (default: `none`) — Cap on how tall `[part="base"]` grows before it scrolls internally. `none` lets the component grow with its content; the `max-height` attribute sets this token.

**`<lr-stream-status>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text-quiet)`) — `indicator` dot color. Swapped by the reflected `phase`: `var(--lr-color-brand)` for `connecting`/`streaming`, `var(--lr-color-warning)` for `stalled`.
**`<lr-stream-status>`** (default: `0.35`) — `indicator` dot opacity. Swapped by the reflected `phase`: `0.6` for `connecting`, `1` for `streaming` and `stalled`.
**`<lr-streaming-text>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1em)`) — Height of the `cursor` bar.
**`<lr-streaming-text>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-0-125rem)`) — Width of the `cursor` bar (also its border radius).
**`<lr-svg-viewer>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum block size of the scrollable body before it scrolls internally. Also settable via the `max-height` property.
**`<lr-swatch-picker>`** (default: `0`) — Blur radius of that same ring. 0 by default (a crisp ring); set a real length (e.g. 0.4rem) for a soft glow instead.
**`<lr-swatch-picker>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) — Ring color drawn around the selected swatch, themeable independently of the focus ring and every other ring color.

**`<lr-swatch-picker>`** (default: `0s`) — Duration of a rhythmic brighten-and-settle "shine" on the selected swatch. `0s` (the default) is a no-op -- today's static look for every existing consumer. Set a real duration (e.g. 1.6s) for a pulsing shine; disabled outright under `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`. Independent of `--lr-swatch-picker-selected-blur` (a separate `filter: brightness()` animation, not `box-shadow`), so the two compose freely, and works identically for a plain color circle and an icon swatch alike.
**`<lr-switch>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-2px)`) — Inset of the thumb from the track's edges.
**`<lr-switch>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1-25rem)`) — Block size of the track; the thumb's diameter is derived from it minus twice `--lr-switch-thumb-offset`.
**`<lr-switch>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-2-25rem)`) — Inline size of the track, and (with the block size) the distance the thumb travels when checked.
**`<lr-table>`** — This cell's position on the heat-tint ramp, as a percentage string. Set inline by the component on each `[data-heat]` cell; not consumer-settable.
**`<lr-table>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) — High endpoint of the heat-tint ramp used by `heatValue` columns.
**`<lr-table>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand-quiet)`) — Low endpoint of the heat-tint ramp used by `heatValue` columns.
**`<lr-table>`** (default: `none`) — Cap on the scroll container's block size, past which the table body scrolls.
**`<lr-table>`** (default: `0.12`) — Hover/focus opacity of the resize handle.
**`<lr-table>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-3rem)`) — Default minimum width for a resizable column without an explicit pixel `minWidth`.

**`<lr-table>`** (default: `0`) — Distance a `sticky` column pins from the inline edge. Measured and set inline per column by the component so multiple sticky columns stack instead of overlapping; falls back to `0` for the first one, or before the first measurement pass.
**`<lr-task-list>`** (default: `1s linear`) — Running-status icon spin animation duration/timing.
**`<lr-terminal>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-20rem)`) — Block size of `[part="viewport"]`, the scrollable log region. Not declared on `:host`, so it is inherited — set it on the host or any ancestor.
**`<lr-textarea>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum auto-grown block size before the textarea scrolls.
**`<lr-thinking-panel>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-16rem)`) — Cap on how tall the expanded reasoning transcript grows before `[part="body"]` scrolls internally.

**`<lr-timeline>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-l)`) — Spacing between consecutive items along the timeline's main axis; also the length each item's own rail visually bridges to reach the next item's marker. Declared here but actually consumed inside each `<lr-timeline-item>`'s own stylesheet, via ordinary CSS custom-property inheritance across the slot boundary.

**`<lr-timeline-item>`** (default: `row`) — Internal orientation plumbing, not a retheming knob: `[part="base"]`'s `flex-direction`, set by an ancestor `<lr-timeline>`'s `:host` and inherited across the slot boundary (`row` vertical, `column` horizontal). The `row` fallback applies when the item is used standalone.

**`<lr-timeline-item>`** (default: `0`) — Internal orientation plumbing, not a retheming knob: `[part="content"]`'s `padding-block-end`, set by a vertical `<lr-timeline>` so the rail reaches the next item's marker. `0` when standalone or horizontal; retheme `--lr-timeline-gap` on `<lr-timeline>` instead.

**`<lr-timeline-item>`** (default: `0`) — Internal orientation plumbing, not a retheming knob: the inline-axis counterpart of `--lr-timeline-item-gap-block-end`, non-zero only under a horizontal `<lr-timeline>`.

**`<lr-timeline-item>`** (default: `visible`) — Internal plumbing, not a retheming knob: `[part="rail"]`'s `visibility`, set to `hidden` by `<lr-timeline>`'s `::slotted(:last-child)` rule so the final item has no trailing rail.

**`<lr-timeline-item>`** (default: `column`) — Internal orientation plumbing, not a retheming knob: `[part="track"]`'s `flex-direction`, always the opposite axis from `--lr-timeline-item-direction` and set alongside it by `<lr-timeline>`.

**`<lr-timeline-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text-quiet)`) — Marker fill/accent color. Swapped per `variant` (see the class doc's variant table); a consumer overriding this directly on one item wins over the variant default via normal CSS cascade/specificity.
**`<lr-timeline-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-1-25rem)`) — Diameter of the marker circle (both inline-size and block-size, so the default dot stays circular).

**`<lr-timeline-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) — Color of the connecting rail line. A component-scoped property (not just inlining `var(--lr-color-border)` at every use site) so a consumer can retint just the rail without touching the library-wide border color elsewhere.
**`<lr-timeline-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-border-width-medium)`) — Thickness of the connecting rail line.

**`<lr-toast>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) — Accent bar / icon color of a slotted item, auto-swapped per its `variant`. Read by `<lr-toast-item>`, so set it on the item.

**`<lr-toast-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) — Color of the accent bar and the icon, auto-swapped per `variant`.

**`<lr-toast>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-4px)`) — Width of a slotted item's accent bar. Read by `<lr-toast-item>`'s own stylesheet, so set it on the item.

**`<lr-toast-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-4px)`) — Width of the accent bar, and the extra inline-start padding reserved for it.

**`<lr-toast>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-size-md)`) — Font size of a slotted item, auto-swapped per its `size`. Read by `<lr-toast-item>`, so set it on the item.

**`<lr-toast-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-size-md)`) — Font size of the item, auto-swapped per `size`.
**`<lr-toast>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-s)`) — Gap between stacked items.

**`<lr-toast>`** (default: `var(--lr-transition-base, 180ms ease-out)`) — Hide transition of a slotted item. Read by `<lr-toast-item>`, so set it on the item.

**`<lr-toast-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-transition-base, 180ms ease-out)`) — Opacity/transform transition used while hiding.

**`<lr-toast>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-m)`) — Padding of a slotted item, auto-swapped per its `size`. Read by `<lr-toast-item>`, so set it on the item.

**`<lr-toast-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-m)`) — Padding of the item, auto-swapped per `size`.

**`<lr-toast>`** (default: `var(--lr-transition-base, 180ms ease-out)`) — Show transition of a slotted item. Read by `<lr-toast-item>`, so set it on the item.

**`<lr-toast-item>`** (default: `var(--lr-transition-base, 180ms ease-out)`) — Opacity/transform transition used while showing.
**`<lr-toast>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-28rem)`) — Inline size of the stack, capped by the viewport minus the placement insets.
**`<lr-token-input>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-8rem)`) — `flex-basis` of the native text input within the token row.
**`<lr-token-input>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-4rem)`) — Inline-size floor of the native text input, so it stays usable once tokens wrap.
**`<lr-tool-approval-dialog>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-mono)`) — Font family for the tool name and the raw-JSON args editor.
**`<lr-tool-approval-dialog>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-overlay)`) — Backdrop scrim color.

**`<lr-tool-call-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-text-quiet)`) — Per-status accent color for the status glyph and status text. Reassigned by this component's own `:host([status="…"])` rules (`running` → brand, `success` → success, `error` → danger, `denied` → warning), so a page-level override only wins for the default/`pending` tone.
**`<lr-tool-call-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-surface)`) — Per-status chip background. Reassigned by the same `:host([status="…"])` rules (each status's `-quiet` tint).
**`<lr-tool-call-chip>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-border)`) — Per-status chip border color. Reassigned by the same `:host([status="…"])` rules (`transparent` for every non-`pending` status).
**`<lr-tool-call-chip>`** (default: `1s linear`) — Running-icon animation duration and timing.
**`<lr-tool-result-dialog>`** — Insets for the maximized panel.
**`<lr-tool-result-dialog>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-overlay)`) — Backdrop color.
**`<lr-tool-result-dialog>`** (default: `1s linear`) — Running-status animation duration and timing.
**`<lr-tool-result-view>`** (default: `var(--lr-font-mono)`) — Font family for the `fallback="text"` preformatted output.
**`<lr-tool-select-dialog>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-overlay)`) — Backdrop scrim color.
**`<lr-tool-timeline>`** (default: `var(--lr-space-l)`) — Vertical gap between entries.
**`<lr-tool-timeline>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-0-625rem)`) — Diameter of an entry's rail dot; also the width of the marker gutter column.
**`<lr-tooltip>`** — Tooltip background color (default `--lr-color-neutral`).
**`<lr-tooltip>`** — Tooltip text color (default `--lr-color-on-neutral`).
**`<lr-tooltip>`** — Maximum inline size of the tooltip (default `--lr-size-20rem`).
**`<lr-tour>`** — Backdrop scrim fill. Defaults to `--lr-color-overlay`.
**`<lr-tour>`** — Maximum popover inline size. Defaults to `--lr-size-22rem`.
**`<lr-tour>`** — Corner radius shared by the cutout and the ring. Defaults to `--lr-radius`.
**`<lr-tour>`** — Spotlight ring color. Defaults to `--lr-color-brand`.
**`<lr-tour>`** — Spotlight ring thickness. Defaults to `--lr-border-width-medium`.

**`<lr-chat-message>`** (default: `1.8s ease-in-out`) — Streaming-indicator animation duration and timing function.

**`<lr-skeleton>`** (default: `1.8s ease-in-out`) — Animation duration and timing function shared by the pulse and sheen effects.

**`<lr-tool-call-chip>`** (default: `1.8s ease-in-out`) — Pending-icon pulse duration and timing.

**`<lr-typing-indicator>`** (default: `1.8s ease-in-out`) — Animation duration and timing function shared by all variants.

**`<lr-tree-node>`** (default: `0`) — Internal indent plumbing, not a retheming knob: this node's `depth`, written inline onto `[part="row"]` by the component and multiplied by `--lr-space-l` (capped at `--lr-size-8rem`) to produce the row's `padding-inline-start`.
**`<lr-typing-indicator>`** (default: `600ms`) — Delay for the second dot in the dots variant.
**`<lr-typing-indicator>`** (default: `1200ms`) — Delay for the third dot in the dots variant.

**`<lr-virtual-list>`** (default: `var(--lr-size-24rem)`) — The scroll viewport's height. A virtualized list needs a bounded scroll extent, so this ships a default rather than collapsing to zero when a caller does not size the host.

**`<lr-widget>`** (default: `var(--lr-widget-fullscreen-inset)`) — The `inset` applied to `[part="backdrop"]`, so the scrim can be pulled back independently of the panel. Also set inline from the `backdrop-inset` attribute (falling back to `fullscreen-inset`). `fullscreen-inset` overrides the default `var(--lr-space-l)` inset applied to `[part="base"]` and `[part="backdrop"]` while fullscreen (e.g. `"0 0 0 240px"` to leave a persistent sidebar visible). `compact` tightens header/body padding — same convention as `lr-empty`'s `compact`.

**`<lr-widget>`** (default: `max(var(--lr-space-l), var(--lr-safe-area-top)) max(var(--lr-space-l), var(--lr-safe-area-inline-end)) max(var(--lr-space-l), var(--lr-safe-area-bottom)) max(var(--lr-space-l), var(--lr-safe-area-inline-start))`) — The `inset` applied to `[part="base"]` while `fullscreen`. Also set inline from the `fullscreen-inset` attribute.
**`<lr-widget>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-overlay)`) — The fullscreen scrim's color, applied to `[part="backdrop"]`.
**`<lr-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-brand)`) — First entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lr-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-success)`) — Second entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lr-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-warning)`) — Third entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lr-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-danger)`) — Fourth entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lr-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-chart-1)`) — Fifth entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lr-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-chart-2)`) — Sixth entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lr-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-chart-3)`) — Seventh entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lr-word-cloud>`** (default: `var(--lr-color-chart-4)`) — Eighth entry of the default categorical palette.
**`<lr-xml-viewer>`** (default: `none`) — Maximum block size of the scrollable body before it scrolls internally. Also settable via the `max-height` property.
**`<lr-zoomable-frame>`** — Minimum viewport block size.

**`<lr-zoomable-frame>`** (default: `1`) — The scale factor applied to `[part="content"]`. Written by the component itself on every render from the current `zoom`, so it is a read-out rather than a consumer knob; set the `zoom` property instead.
